summary: 3 pre-existing color-contrast (serious) violations found on /guide/ at desktop viewport; these are pre-existing site-wide issues not introduced by the CLV-008 copy tweak, but bounce is required by scoring rules for any error-severity finding. 3 new baselines established (mobile, tablet, desktop).

findings.message:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.56 (foreground color: #94a3b8, background color: #ffffff, font size: 6.8pt (9px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
